title: Issue 2044 runtime semantics IR and projections
lane_outcome: Extend source contracts or IR so ordinary command packet, gate, routing, error, and output semantics can be represented and projected without target-runtime hand edits.
purpose_for_parent: Supplies the portable semantic model for generated targets.
technical_strategy: Tighten the lane strategy before the first slice starts.
acceptance_boundary: All lane slices have landed, lane proof aggregation is satisfied, and residual work is routed.
proof_strategy: Run contract validation, regenerate target outputs, and prove generated artifacts are fresh and structurally equivalent.
